query: SELECT id, projectId, stageNumber, stageName, stageStatus, LEFT(errorMessage, 500) as errorMsg, updatedAt FROM joelle_analysis_stages WHERE stageNumber = 10 ORDER BY updatedAt DESC LIMIT 10;
